_comment: Pins for install-stt-tools.mjs (the offline speech-to-text sidecar for Communication Coach's Microphone Assist). Engine: whisper.cpp (MIT). FAIL-CLOSED: a model is only staged if its bytes match the sha256 pinned here; a null sha256 means 'not pinned yet' and the installer refuses it. The GGML models live on Hugging Face, which isn't always reachable from CI — pin a HAND-VERIFIED hash. To pin: run `node scripts/install-stt-tools.mjs --pin tiny.en` on a machine with Hugging Face access; it downloads the model and prints its sha256. Cross-check it against the model card, then paste it below in a deliberate commit. The whisper BINARY is not downloaded here (no clean cross-platform pinned release): on Windows use the prebuilt whisper-cli from the whisper.cpp releases; on Linux/Raspberry Pi build it (`make`) or install via your package manager; then drop whisper-cli (or main) in portable/stt/bin/ or on PATH.

tiny.en.note: Smallest + fastest. Best for short phrases on modest hardware like a Raspberry Pi 5.

base.en.note: More accurate, a bit more CPU. Good on a laptop/desktop.
